title: Save compatibility policy draft
summary: Draft the M7 external-test save compatibility policy, import/export instructions and breakage boundaries without making a final public save promise.
acceptance: Drafts external-test save compatibility policy, import/export instructions, breakage allowances and known risks
Carries Windows/Web save-container interoperability as a blocker until a reviewed desktop save bridge exists
Does not make a final public save compatibility commitment without owner approval
Records save/replay and M5 hash protection expectations for M7 validation
Provides citable save-policy boundaries for known issues, playtest protocol and M7 closeout

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until WM-0098 is verified, integrated and done.

objective: Make external-test save handling clear while preserving reviewed save/replay and product-gate blockers.
forbiddenPaths: save schema migration without reviewed plan
arbitrary filesystem bridge or broad IPC
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or hosted save service
public release upload store submission signing installer or updater
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: policy draft becomes a public save promise; keep language draft and owner-gated.
Risk: desktop save bridge work touches host security; require narrow reviewed bridge scope if needed.
File ownership is limited to persistence/platform save docs, focused tests and WM-0105 reports.
ownerGate: Block on final public save compatibility promises
Block on save format migration, broad host filesystem access or arbitrary IPC without reviewed scope
Block on hosted save services, telemetry, accounts, paid services, release upload or M8 work
m0M6RegressionCoverage: Preserve M5 save/replay and final hashes
Preserve M6 Windows/Web interoperability blocker until resolved by reviewed task
benchmarkImpact: No benchmark baseline change expected. Save bridge or import/export changes must keep hot simulation paths unaffected.
reviewRouting: systems-architect completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies draft status, save blocker handling and absence of public compatibility commitment.
rollbackModel: Revert save policy docs, focused save-surface changes and WM-0105 reports; leave M6 blocker evidence intact.

sparkEligibility.reason: Save compatibility policy touches persistence commitments, security boundaries and owner-gated public promises.
